  "knot_symptoms": ["variable_binding_drift", "repair_without_recovery"],
  "primary_trigger": "symbol_binding",
  "knot_quote": "For the internal circle tangent at X, its center C is on the line OX, and |O C| = 13 - r, |C X| = r, and since internal, C is closer to X.",

  "reversal_count": 1,

  "recovers_later": "yes",
  "open_diagnosis": "The model incorrectly assumes that the center C of the internal circle is closer to X than O, which is not necessarily true. This leads to a variable binding drift as the model later revises its understanding of the center's position.",

glm_parsed.knot_quote: For the internal circle tangent at X, its center C is on the line OX, and |O C| = 13 - r, |C X| = r, and since internal, C is closer to X.
glm_parsed.open_diagnosis: The model incorrectly assumes that the center C of the internal circle is closer to X than O, which is not necessarily true. This leads to a variable binding drift as the model later revises its understanding of the center's position.
